description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark metallic finish and a minimalist design. The front features a high-resolution display showing a desktop wallpaper with a mountain landscape, surrounded by thin bezels. The keyboard is backlit and features a standard QWERTY layout with a large trackpad below it. The exterior lid displays a prominent, glossy black Apple logo centered on the matte surface. The laptop is slim, with a low profile and gently rounded edges, and appears to be constructed primarily from aluminum. No external ports or stickers are visible on the sides or palm rest, emphasizing its clean and streamlined appearance.
description: A slim, dark metallic laptop with a backlit keyboard, large trackpad, and a prominent Apple logo on the lid. The display shows a mountain wallpaper, and the design is minimalist and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display with a mountain wallpaper, backlit keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and thin screen; no ports or features are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte lid with a glossy black Apple logo centered; the hinge is not prominent.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and edge of the keyboard; no ports or features are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the exterior lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with a mountain landscape.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad visible.
